mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_user WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (username, password_hash, display_name, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{status})
